GLUMETZA (metformin hydrochloride) extended release tablets, as monotherapy, is indicated as an
adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adult patients (18 years and older) with
type 2 diabetes. GLUMETZA may be used concomitantly with a sulfonylurea or insulin to improve
